revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Sha'ban 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Sha'ban]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 22 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Sha'ban]] [[ar:22 شعبان]] [[fa:۲۲ شعبان]] [[id:22 Syakban]] [[sd:22 شعبان]] [[ur:22 شعبان]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Sha'ban 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Sha'ban]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 22 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Sha'ban]] [[ar:22 شعبان]] [[fa:۲۲ شعبان]] [[id:22 Syakban]] [[sd:22 شعبان]] [[ur:22 شعبان]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Sha'ban 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Sha'ban]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 22 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Sha'ban]] [[ar:22 شعبان]] [[fa:۲۲ شعبان]] [[id:22 Syakban]] [[sd:22 شعبان]] [[ur:22 شعبان]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/4136044]])
Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121221)
working on the date checking
Adding [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Qq 4]]" to ""
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:22 شعبان]][[fa:۲۲ شعبان]][[id:22 Syakban]][[ms:22 Syaaban]][[sd:22 شعبان]][[ur:22 شعبان]]
{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Sha'ban}}

'''Sha'ban 22''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 22nd day of the month [[Sha'ban]].

==See also==

==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[ar:22 شعبان]] [[fa:۲۲ شعبان]] [[id:22 Syakban]] [[sd:22 شعبان]] [[ur:22 شعبان]] {{Islamic Calendar}}
